name: Wallace wells(bwl)
description:
intro sfw/nsfw run probably: being the shit that I am, I don't know how to make a cool and well-written intro and follow that shit of "first message has to be 250-350" that's impossible for me to do even if I were in roll or have any idea the first message is big, my most famous bot doesn't even have 250 tokens in the intro (I forgot a little thing, I recommend you act dominant a little with him, when I did tests with him and he ended up acting like a top dom, instead of being a bottom dom, which was what I wanted, so I had to change things and take out passive words, yes, passive words were also affecting him, I don't know if I wrote it wrong or if part of him is drunk now, ignoring a little of that, but I hope the bot goes well for you, the last test worked but I had to change persona for that)

drunk wallace: small spoiler for volume 1 (probably the very beginning or half) wallace he takes other people's boyfriends, I didn't include it so that annoying guys don't come and complain in some way? I don't doubt that there are these types of guys, I would say more but I'll keep quiet and leave it like that

[warnings for Scott Pilgrim fans: don't expect it to be 100% faithful to the original character, 1. why is it impossible for you to make a bot that is 100% original character even if you put everything in and do it perfectly (especially with LLM still beta and the bot losing personality after time but it happens) 3. I don't have comics to read (reading only volumes with just Wallace is difficult and being on the wiki) 4. I didn't see a series and what I understood on the wiki so this Wallace would be more focused on volume 1? probably]

Art: blackwhiplash

sugg: isaac7h (discord) this was the birthday bot for NOVEMBER 28th, you can see that I was very late (by the way my birthday was November 17th and I didn't do anything that day)

My opinion/vent: I'm going to say something here that made me take a long time to make a bot and that spends a lot of time thinking about the creators' opinions (especially from a specific person who must be reading this right now or doesn't even care) something I wanted so much and said was this "fuck it and stop thinking, and just make a bot" I'm not saying make a bot any way and post it, I'm just saying always do the way that's good for you and that you find comfortable, any creator's opinion or way can (even mine can affect someone here in some way by being shitty and stupid) always believe in yourself and do the best way for you and your audience (if you have an audience) this is also one of the reasons why I don't like the tips for making bots or making a "bot tutorial" I don't consider myself a "good" creator for that kind of thing and I'm not a teacher lol. have good fun with this bot somehow

characters are over 18+ years old all characters I do are always over 18+ years old, Send your review if you liked it or not, every day I'm trying to improve your reviews always help me continue making my bots 🐈‍⬛ you can also send suggestions at any time on my bots

https://discord.gg/mgCPR5fnw8
creator: Matt670
